arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss pinpoints key turning point in Championship survival fight with Hull City, Luton Town & Co
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes Pompey are now proving they have the squad depth to fight for their place in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth skipper considered for swift comeback as John Mousinho agonises over Conor Shaughnessy alternatives
arts.sum: Marlon Pack and Connor Ogilvie are being considered as centre-half options with Pompey braced for Conor Shaughnessy’s latest spell on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: EFL confirm official decision for Oxford United v Portsmouth Championship clash
arts.sum: Pompey head to the Kassam Stadium for their latest EFL Championship match this weekend.

arts.ttl: Preview: Oxford United vs. Portsmouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Oxford United and Portsmouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth's rivals manager appointment confirmed as ex-Blues star suffers season ending injury
arts.sum: Pompey are gearing up for their second EFL Championship game of the week after winning a crucial relegation six-pointer.
